name: Firamon
description: A Beast Digimon with the alias " Sky-soaring Lion ". It guards a certain ruins site located in the Digital World , and is also a caring leader-figure. Its Special Moves are cloaking its entire body in flames and attacking by diving down from the air ( Flame Dive ), as well as tearing the enemy apart with its powerful, flame-covered front limbs ( Fira Claw ). Not only that, it is also capable of concentrating all of its energy into its forehead, and firing a flaming bomb ( Fira Bomb ).
